subject: Meeting Tomorrow at 2 PM
body: Hi team, we have a standup meeting scheduled for tomorrow at 2 PM. Please come prepared with your updates.

subject: Server CPU Usage Critical
body: ALERT: Server-01 CPU usage has exceeded 95%. Immediate action required.

subject: New Travel Policy Effective Next Month
body: Please note the updated travel policy. All bookings should go through the new platform starting next month.

subject: Limited Time Offer: 50% Off Everything!
body: Click here for amazing deals on products you don't need. Unsubscribe link at bottom.

subject: Q2 Performance Review Pending
body: Your Q2 performance review is due this week. Please submit your self-assessment.

subject: Code Review Request for PR #234
body: Please review the changes in PR #234 and provide feedback.

subject: Your Account Balance is Low
body: This is a phishing attempt. Please do not click the link below.

subject: Security Breach Detected
body: We have detected unauthorized access. All engineers required for emergency meeting NOW.
